model.save_data.silver_bitrix_deal_stage.name: silver_bitrix_deal_stage_custom_field
model.save_data.silver_bitrix_deal_stage.description: Modelo da camada Silver com dados de itens dinâmicos do Bitrix CRM (entity 162). Este modelo padroniza nomes de colunas, converte tipos de dados, ajusta o timezone das colunas de data para o horário de Brasília (-6 horas), normaliza textos como títulos com capitalização adequada e organiza atributos financeiros e categóricos para consumo analítico posterior.

dynamic_item_id.description: Identificador único do item dinâmico no Bitrix CRM.

ideal_id.name: ideal_id
ideal_id.description: Identificador do registro no sistema Ideal, derivado do campo xml_id do Bitrix com remoção do prefixo "D_".

title.name: title
title.description: Título do item dinâmico com padronização de capitalização, mantendo a primeira letra de cada palavra em maiúsculo.

created_at.name: created_at
created_at.description: Data e hora de criação do item no Bitrix CRM, ajustada para o timezone de Brasília.

close_date.name: close_date
close_date.description: Data de fechamento do item dinâmico convertida para o tipo DATE.

amount.name: amount
amount.description: Valor financeiro associado ao item dinâmico (opportunity), convertido para decimal.

category_id.name: category_id
category_id.description: Identificador da categoria do item dinâmico no Bitrix CRM.

inserted_at.name: inserted_at
inserted_at.description: Data e hora em que o registro foi inserido na camada Bronze.

transformed_at_silver.name: transformed_at_silver
transformed_at_silver.description: Data e hora em que a transformação da camada Silver foi executada.

model.save_data.silver_bitrix_deal_stage.raw_code:
{{ config(
    materialized='table',
    post_hook=[
        "CREATE INDEX idx_dynamic_items_162_ideal_id ON {{ this }} (ideal_id)",
        "CREATE INDEX idx_dynamic_items_162_created_at ON {{ this }} (created_at)",
        "CREATE INDEX idx_dynamic_items_162_close_date ON {{ this }} (close_date)",
        "CREATE INDEX idx_dynamic_items_162_category_id ON {{ this }} (category_id)"
    ]
) }}

WITH source AS (

    SELECT *
    FROM {{ source('bronze', 'bronze_bitrix_dynamic_items_162') }}

),

transformer AS (

    SELECT

        -- keys
        cast(try_cast(id as decimal(18,2)) as int)                       as dynamic_item_id,

        -- business identifiers
        cast(REPLACE(xml_id,'D_','') as varchar(100))                    as ideal_id,

        -- title normalization
        CAST(
   
                (
                    SELECT STRING_AGG(
                        UPPER(LEFT(value,1)) + LOWER(SUBSTRING(value,2,LEN(value))),
                        ' '
                    )
                    FROM STRING_SPLIT(TRIM(title),' ')
                )
       
        AS varchar(255))                                                 as title,

        -- timestamps (timezone ajustado)
        dateadd(hour,-6,cast(created_time as datetime2))                 as created_at,

        -- business dates
        cast(closedate as date)                                          as close_date,

        -- financial attributes
        cast(try_cast(opportunity as decimal(18,2)) as decimal(18,2))    as amount,

        -- category
        cast(try_cast(category_id as decimal(18,2)) as int)              as category_id,

        -- ingestion
        cast(inserted_at as datetime2)                                   as inserted_at,

        -- transformation timestamp
        CURRENT_TIMESTAMP                                                as transformed_at_silver

    FROM source

)

SELECT *
FROM transformer

model.save_data.silver_bitrix_user.raw_code:
{{ config(
    materialized='table',
    post_hook=[
        "CREATE INDEX idx_user_department_id ON {{ this }} (department_id)",
        "CREATE INDEX idx_user_dep_level_1_id ON {{ this }} (dep_level_1_id)",
        "CREATE INDEX idx_user_dep_level_2_id ON {{ this }} (dep_level_2_id)",
        "CREATE INDEX idx_user_active ON {{ this }} (active)"
    ]
) }}

WITH source AS (

    select
        id,
        active,
        name,
        department,
        department_ids,
        department_id,
        department_name,
        department_id_name,
        dep1,
        dep2,
        dep3,
        dep1_id,
        dep2_id,
        dep3_id,
        dep1_n,
        dep2_n,
        dep3_n,
        inserted_at
    from {{ source('bronze', 'bronze_bitrix_user') }}

),

transformer AS (

    SELECT 
        -- keys
        cast(try_cast(id as decimal(18,2)) as int)             as user_id,

        -- status / attributes
        cast(active as varchar(255))                           as active,
        cast(name as varchar(255))                             as user_name,

        -- department (raw + normalized)
        cast(department as varchar(255))                       as department,
        cast(department_ids as varchar(255))                   as department_ids,

        cast(try_cast(department_id as decimal(18,2)) as int)  as department_id,
        cast(department_name as varchar(255))                  as department_name,
        cast(department_id_name as varchar(255))               as department_id_name,

        -- department levels (names)
        cast(dep1 as varchar(255))                             as dep_level_1_name,
        cast(dep2 as varchar(255))                             as dep_level_2_name,
        cast(dep3 as varchar(255))                             as dep_level_3_name,

        -- department levels (ids)
        cast(try_cast(dep1_id as decimal(18,2)) as int)        as dep_level_1_id,
        cast(try_cast(dep2_id as decimal(18,2)) as int)        as dep_level_2_id,
        cast(try_cast(dep3_id as decimal(18,2)) as int)        as dep_level_3_id,

        -- department levels (alt names)
        cast(dep1_n as varchar(255))                           as dep_level_1_label,
        cast(dep2_n as varchar(255))                           as dep_level_2_label,
        cast(dep3_n as varchar(255))                           as dep_level_3_label,

        -- ingestion / audit
        cast(inserted_at as datetime2)                         as inserted_at,

        -- transformation timestamp (obrigatório)
        current_timestamp                                      as transformed_at_silver

    FROM source

)

select *
FROM transformer

model.save_data.silver_bitrix_stages.name: silver_bitrix_stages
model.save_data.silver_bitrix_stages.description: Modelo da camada Silver que representa a dimensão de estágios (stages) das entidades do Bitrix CRM. Este modelo padroniza nomes de colunas, converte tipos de dados e organiza as informações de estágio utilizadas nos pipelines de vendas e processos do CRM. A tabela pode ser utilizada como dimensão em análises de funil de vendas, histórico de movimentação de negociações e métricas de desempenho por estágio.

),

transformer AS (

    SELECT
        -- keys
        cast(try_cast(id as decimal(18,2)) as int)             as deal_id,
        cast(try_cast(lead_id as decimal(18,2)) as int)        as lead_id,
        cast(try_cast(company_id as decimal(18,2)) as int)     as company_id,
        cast(try_cast(contact_id as decimal(18,2)) as int)     as contact_id,
        cast(try_cast(crm_product_id as decimal(18,2)) as int) as crm_product_id,
        cast(try_cast(category_id as decimal(18,2)) as int)    as category_id,
        cast(stage_id as varchar(100))                         as stage_id,
        cast(stage_semantic_id as varchar(100))                as stage_semantic_id,
        cast(try_cast(location_id as decimal(18,2)) as int)    as location_id,
        cast(try_cast(webform_id as decimal(18,2)) as int)     as webform_id,

        -- audit / ownership
        dateadd(hour, -6, cast(date_create as datetime2))      as created_at,
        dateadd(hour, -6, cast(date_modify as datetime2))      as modified_at,
        cast(created_by_id as int)                             as created_by_user_id,
        cast(modify_by_id as int)                              as modified_by_user_id,
        cast(assigned_by_id as int)                            as assigned_to_user_id,
        cast(moved_by_id as int)                               as moved_by_user_id,
        dateadd(hour, -6, cast(moved_time as datetime2))       as moved_at,

        -- business attributes
        cast(opened as varchar(50))                            as opened,
        CAST(
                (
                    SELECT STRING_AGG(
                        UPPER(LEFT(value,1)) + LOWER(SUBSTRING(value,2,LEN(value))),
                        ' '
                    )
                    FROM STRING_SPLIT(TRIM(company_name),' ')
                )
                AS varchar(255)) AS company_name,
        CAST(
            (
                SELECT STRING_AGG(
                    UPPER(LEFT(value,1)) + LOWER(SUBSTRING(value,2,LEN(value))),
                    ' '
                )
                FROM STRING_SPLIT(TRIM(title),' ')
            )
            AS varchar(255))                                   AS deal_title,    
        cast(category_name as varchar(255))                    as category_name,
        cast(stage_name as varchar(255))                       as stage_name,
        cast(stage_semantic as varchar(255))                   as stage_semantic,
        cast(is_new as varchar(50))                            as is_new,
        cast(is_recurring as varchar(50))                      as is_recurring,
        cast(is_return_customer as varchar(50))                as is_return_customer,
        cast(closed as varchar(50))                            as closed,

        cast(opportunity as decimal(18,2))                     as amount,
        cast(is_manual_opportunity as varchar(50))             as is_manual_opportunity,
        cast(tax_value as decimal(18,2))                       as tax_amount,
        cast(currency_id as varchar(50))                       as currency_id,
        cast(opportunity_account as decimal(18,2))             as account_amount,
        cast(tax_value_account as decimal(18,2))               as account_tax_amount,
        cast(account_currency_id as varchar(50))               as account_currency_id,
        cast(probability as decimal(5,2))                      as probability,

        cast(comments as varchar(max))                         as comments,
        dateadd(hour, -6, cast(begindate as datetime2))        as begin_at,
        dateadd(hour, -6, cast(closedate as datetime2))        as close_at,
        cast(source_name as varchar(255))                      as source_name,

        -- ingestion / source
        cast(inserted_at as datetime2)                         as inserted_at,
        cast(system_source as varchar(100))                    as system_source,

        -- transformation timestamp (obrigatório)
        current_timestamp                                      as transformed_at_silver

    FROM source

)

SELECT *
FROM transformer

{{ config(
    materialized='table',
    post_hook=[
        "CREATE INDEX idx_deal_partner_deal_id ON {{ this }} (deal_id)",
        "CREATE INDEX idx_deal_partner_name ON {{ this }} (partner_name)"
        "CREATE INDEX idx_deal_cnpj ON {{ this }} (cnpj)"
    ]
) }}

WITH source AS (

    SELECT *
    FROM {{ source('bronze', 'bronze_bitrix_deal_uf') }}

),

transformer AS (

    SELECT

        -- keys
        CAST(try_cast(deal_id as decimal(18,2)) as int)                   as deal_id,

        -- partner attributes
       CAST(
            CASE 
                WHEN uf_crm_1761327651 = '' OR uf_crm_1761327651 IS NULL
                THEN 'Sem parceiro externo'
                ELSE uf_crm_1761327651
            END                                                               
        AS varchar(255)
       )                                                    as partner_name,

        cast(try_cast(uf_crm_1674504869 as float) as float)/100           as commission_percent,

        -- location
        CAST(NULLIF(
                (
                    SELECT STRING_AGG(
                        UPPER(LEFT(value,1)) + LOWER(SUBSTRING(value,2,LEN(value))),
                        ' '
                    )
                    FROM STRING_SPLIT(TRIM(uf_crm_1758224216498),' ')
                ), '')
                AS varchar(255))                                            AS state,

        CAST(NULLIF(
                (
                    SELECT STRING_AGG(
                        UPPER(LEFT(value,1)) + LOWER(SUBSTRING(value,2,LEN(value))),
                        ' '
                    )
                    FROM STRING_SPLIT(TRIM(uf_crm_1672781757),' ')
                ), '')
                AS varchar(255))                                            AS city,

        CAST(NULLIF(
                (
                    SELECT STRING_AGG(
                        UPPER(LEFT(value,1)) + LOWER(SUBSTRING(value,2,LEN(value))),
                        ' '
                    )
                    FROM STRING_SPLIT(TRIM(uf_crm_1672781723),' ')
                ), '')
                AS varchar(255))                                            AS address,

        CAST(NULLIF(
                (
                    SELECT STRING_AGG(
                        UPPER(LEFT(value,1)) + LOWER(SUBSTRING(value,2,LEN(value))),
                        ' '
                    )
                    FROM STRING_SPLIT(TRIM(uf_crm_1673994278222),' ')
                ), '')
                AS varchar(255))                                            AS neighborhood,
        -- document normalization
        CAST(
            TRIM(
                REPLACE(
                    REPLACE(
                        REPLACE(
                            REPLACE(uf_crm_63c14d3c80814, '-', ''),
                        '.', ''),
                    '/', ''),
                ' ', '')
            ) AS varchar(14)
                                                      )                   as cnpj,

        -- ingestion
        cast(inserted_at as datetime2)                                    as inserted_at,
        cast(system_source as varchar(100))                               as system_source,

        -- transformation timestamp
        CURRENT_TIMESTAMP                                                 as transformed_at_silver

    FROM source

)

SELECT *
FROM transformer

                    FROM STRING_SPLIT(TRIM(address_region),' ')

                        UPPER(LEFT(value,1)) + LOWER(SUBSTRING(value,2,LEN(value))),
                        ' '
                    )
                    FROM STRING_SPLIT(TRIM(comments),' ')

        cast(system_source as varchar(100))                                 as system_source,

        current_timestamp                                                   as transformed_at_silver

    FROM source

)

Este modelo consolida informações cadastrais da empresa a partir da camada Silver, relacionando dados da empresa, negociação e campos complementares do deal. A dimensão retorna um único registro por empresa, priorizando o deal mais recente, e organiza atributos de identificação, localização e contato para consumo analítico em relatórios, dashboards e modelos dimensionais.

WITH negocios AS (

    SELECT
        negocio.deal_id,
        negocio.company_id
    FROM {{ ref('silver_bitrix_deal_sinthetic') }} negocio

),

deal_custom_fields AS (

    SELECT
        deal_id,
        state,
        city,
        address,
        neighborhood,
        cast(NULLIF(TRIM(cnpj), '') as varchar(14))            as cnpj
    FROM {{ ref('silver_bitrix_deal_custom_field') }}

),

empresas AS (

    SELECT
        empresa.company_id,
        empresa.created_at, 
        negocio.deal_id,

        campos.cnpj,
        campos.state,
        campos.city,
        campos.address,
        campos.neighborhood,
        empresa.phone,
        empresa.email,
        row_number() over (
            partition by empresa.company_id
            order by empresa.company_id, negocio.deal_id desc
        )                                                                 as rn

    FROM {{ ref('silver_bitrix_company') }} empresa
    LEFT JOIN negocios negocio

    LEFT JOIN deal_custom_fields campos

    state,
    city,
    address,
    neighborhood,
    phone,
    email,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP                                                     as transformed_at_gold
FROM empresas
WHERE rn = 1
  AND company_id <> 34

model.save_data.d_bitrix_products_servic.name: d_bitrix_products_services
model.save_data.d_bitrix_products_servic.description: Dimensão da camada Gold que representa os produtos e serviços cadastrados no Bitrix. Este modelo consolida os produtos provenientes da camada Silver e aplica uma classificação analítica baseada em padrões presentes no nome do produto. A dimensão permite agrupar produtos em categorias funcionais utilizadas em análises financeiras e operacionais, como administrativo, judicial, passivo e outros serviços. Também inclui um registro padrão para produtos ainda não classificados ou não definidos.

product_id.name: product_id
product_id.description: Identificador único do produto ou serviço no Bitrix.

product_name.name: product_name
product_name.description: Nome do produto ou serviço conforme cadastrado no sistema operacional.

category_product_name.name: category_product_name
category_product_name.description: Categoria analítica do produto derivada do nome do produto. A classificação agrupa produtos em categorias como Administrativo, Judicial, MSC, Passivo ou outros produtos ainda não definidos.

transformed_at_gold.name: transformed_at_gold
transformed_at_gold.description: Data e hora em que a transformação da camada Gold foi executada.

model.save_data.d_bitrix_products_servic.raw_code:
{{ config(
    materialized='table',
    post_hook=[
        "CREATE INDEX idx_d_bitrix_products_services_product_id ON {{ this }} (product_id)",
        "CREATE INDEX idx_d_bitrix_products_services_category_product_name ON {{ this }} (category_product_name)"
    ]
) }}

WITH source AS (

    SELECT *
    FROM {{ ref('silver_bitrix_products_services') }}

),

transformer AS (

    SELECT
        product_id,
        product_name,
        product_type,

        CASE
            WHEN product_name LIKE '%(ADM)%'                   THEN 'Valor Administrativo'
            WHEN product_name LIKE '%(JUD)%'                   THEN 'Valor Judicial'
            WHEN product_name LIKE '%(MSC)%'                   THEN 'Valor MSC (MS Coletivo)'
            WHEN product_name LIKE '%(PASSIVO)%'               THEN 'Valor Passivo'
            WHEN product_name LIKE '%Verbas - Indenizatórias%' THEN 'Valor Providenciário'
            ELSE 'Outros produtos ainda não definidos'
        END                                                    as category_product_name,

        price

    FROM source

),

default_row AS (

    SELECT
        cast(1 as int)                                         as product_id,
        cast('Em Definição' as varchar(255))                   as product_name,
        cast('Em Definição' as varchar(255))                   as product_type,
        cast('Outros produtos ainda não definidos' as varchar(255)) as category_product_name,
        cast(0 as decimal(18,2))                               as price


),

dim_produto AS (

    SELECT * FROM transformer
    UNION ALL
    SELECT * FROM default_row

)

SELECT
    product_id,
    product_name,
    product_type,
    category_product_name,
    price,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP as transformed_at_gold
FROM dim_produto

model.save_data.d_bitrix_user.description: Dimensão da camada Gold com dados de usuários do processo operacional do sistema Bitrix. Este modelo consolida informações de usuários provenientes da camada Silver, preservando atributos de status, estrutura organizacional e hierarquia de departamentos para consumo analítico posterior. A dimensão pode ser utilizada em análises de performance operacional, distribuição por áreas, ownership de deals e organização interna.

model.save_data.d_bitrix_user.raw_code:
{{ config(materialized='table') }}

WITH source AS (

    SELECT *
    FROM {{ ref('silver_bitrix_user') }}

),

transformer AS (

    SELECT

        -- keys
        user_id,

        -- status / attributes
        active,
        user_name,

        -- department (raw + normalized)
        department_id,
        department_name,
        department_id_name,

        -- department levels (names)
        dep_level_1_name,
        dep_level_2_name,
        dep_level_3_name,

        -- department levels (ids)
        dep_level_1_id,
        dep_level_2_id,
        dep_level_3_id,

        -- department levels (alt names)
        dep_level_1_label,
        dep_level_2_label,
        dep_level_3_label,

               -- ingestion / audit
        inserted_at,

        -- transformation timestamp (obrigatório)
        transformed_at_silver,

        -- transformation timestamp (obrigatório)
        CURRENT_TIMESTAMP                      as transformed_at_gold
        
    FROM source

)

SELECT *
FROM transformer

model.save_data.f_bitrix_deal_rt.name: f_bitrix_deal_rt
model.save_data.f_bitrix_deal_rt.description: Fato da camada Gold com dados consolidados de deals do Bitrix, do processo de recuperação tributária, onde a pipeline é igual a 'Lucro Real' ou 'Simples Nacional'. Este modelo integra informações de negociação, estágio, produto, responsável, parceiro e comissão a partir da camada Silver. A view foi estruturada para suportar análises operacionais e gerenciais sobre pipeline, diagnóstico, fechamento, honorários e performance comercial.

deal_id.name: deal_id
deal_id.description: Identificador único do deal no Bitrix.

company_id.name: company_id
company_id.description: Identificador da empresa associada ao deal.

assigned_to_user_id.name: assigned_to_user_id
assigned_to_user_id.description: Identificador do usuário responsável pelo deal.

department_name.name: department_name
department_name.description: Nome do departamento do responsável pelo deal.

product_id.name: product_id
product_id.description: Identificador do produto principal associado ao deal.

company_name.name: company_name
company_name.description: Nome da empresa associada ao deal.

cnpj.name: cnpj
cnpj.description: CNPJ da empresa associada ao deal, padronizado sem valores vazios.

partner_name.name: partner_name
partner_name.description: Nome do parceiro associado ao deal.

product_name.name: product_name
product_name.description: Nome do produto principal associado ao deal.

stage_name.name: stage_name
stage_name.description: Nome do estágio atual do deal.

stage_semantic.name: stage_semantic
stage_semantic.description: Classificação semântica do estágio do deal, como sucesso, perda ou processo em andamento.

pipeline.name: pipeline
pipeline.description: Nome do pipeline ou categoria de negócio do deal.

date_created.name: date_created
date_created.description: Data e hora de criação do deal.

date_show_diagnosis.name: date_show_diagnosis
date_show_diagnosis.description: Data e hora da primeira entrada do deal no estágio Apresentação de Diagnóstico.

date_win.name: date_win
date_win.description: Data e hora da primeira entrada do deal no estágio Ganho.

date_deal_release.name: date_deal_release
date_deal_release.description: Data e hora de liberação do deal, considerando a entrada em diagnóstico ou, na ausência dela, a data de criação do deal.

flg_stage_name.name: flg_stage_name
flg_stage_name.description: Indicador se o deal passou pelo estágio Em Diagnóstico.

flg_cancelled.name: flg_cancelled
flg_cancelled.description: Indicador se o deal foi classificado como cancelado com base no estágio e categoria mapeados na dimensão de estágios.

amount_product.name: amount_product
amount_product.description: Valor do produto principal associado ao deal.

percent_commission.name: percent_commission
percent_commission.description: Percentual de comissão associado ao parceiro do deal.

amount_honorary.name: amount_honorary
amount_honorary.description: Valor de honorário calculado a partir do valor do produto e do percentual de comissão.

transformed_at_gold.name: transformed_at_gold
transformed_at_gold.description: Data e hora em que a transformação da camada Gold foi executada.

model.save_data.f_bitrix_deal_rt.raw_code:
{{ config(
    materialized='view',

) }}

WITH custom_fields_company AS (

    SELECT
        deal_id,
        partner_name,
        commission_percent,
        cnpj
    FROM {{ ref('silver_bitrix_deal_custom_field') }}

),

deal_stage_history_unique AS (

    SELECT
        deal_id,
        max(case when stage_name = 'Em Diagnóstico' then 1 else 0 end) as flg_stage_name
    FROM {{ ref('silver_bitrix_deal_stage_history') }}
    GROUP BY deal_id

),

deal_stage_history_first AS (

    SELECT
        deal_id,
        stage_name,
        min(created_at) as created_at
    FROM {{ ref('silver_bitrix_deal_stage_history') }}
    GROUP BY
        deal_id,
        stage_name

),

deal_sinthetic AS (

    SELECT
        deal_id,
        company_id,
        assigned_to_user_id,
        company_name,
        stage_id,
        stage_name,
        stage_semantic,
        category_id,
        category_name,
        created_at
    FROM {{ ref('silver_bitrix_deal_sinthetic') }}

),

produto AS (

    SELECT
        product.deal_id,
        max(case when product.product_name is null then 'Em Definição' else product.product_name end) as product_name,
        max(case when product.product_id is null then 1 else product.product_id end)                  as product_id,
        max(cast(product.price as decimal(18,2)))                                                     as price
    FROM {{ ref('silver_bitrix_deal_analytic') }} product
    GROUP BY product.deal_id

),

in_diagnosis AS (

    SELECT
        deal_id,
        created_at
    FROM deal_stage_history_first
    WHERE stage_name = 'Em Diagnóstico'

),

show_diagnosis AS (

    SELECT
        deal_id,
        created_at
    FROM deal_stage_history_first
    WHERE stage_name = 'Apresentação de Diagnóstico'

),

win_contracts AS (

{% macro sqlserver__get_catalog(information_schemas, schemas) -%}
    {% set query_label = apply_label() %}
    {%- call statement('catalog', fetch_result=True) -%}

        with
        principals as (
            select
                name as principal_name,
                principal_id as principal_id
            from
                sys.database_principals {{ information_schema_hints() }}
        ),

        schemas as (
            select
                name as schema_name,
                schema_id as schema_id,
                principal_id as principal_id
            from
                sys.schemas {{ information_schema_hints() }}
        ),

        tables as (
            select
                object_id,
                name as table_name,
                schema_id as schema_id,
                principal_id as principal_id,
                'BASE TABLE' as table_type
            from
                sys.tables {{ information_schema_hints() }}
        ),

        tables_with_metadata as (
            select
                object_id,
                table_name,
                schema_name,
                coalesce(tables.principal_id, schemas.principal_id) as owner_principal_id,
                table_type
            from
                tables
            join schemas on tables.schema_id = schemas.schema_id
        ),

        views as (
            select
                object_id,
                name as table_name,
                schema_id as schema_id,
                principal_id as principal_id,
                'VIEW' as table_type
            from
                sys.views {{ information_schema_hints() }}
        ),

        views_with_metadata as (
            select
                object_id,
                table_name,
                schema_name,
                coalesce(views.principal_id, schemas.principal_id) as owner_principal_id,
                table_type
            from
                views
            join schemas on views.schema_id = schemas.schema_id
        ),

        tables_and_views as (
            select
                object_id,
                table_name,
                schema_name,
                principal_name,
                table_type
            from
                tables_with_metadata
            join principals on tables_with_metadata.owner_principal_id = principals.principal_id
            union all
            select
                object_id,
                table_name,
                schema_name,
                principal_name,
                table_type
            from
                views_with_metadata
            join principals on views_with_metadata.owner_principal_id = principals.principal_id
        ),

        cols as (

            select
                c.object_id,
                c.name as column_name,
                c.column_id as column_index,
                t.name as column_type
            from sys.columns as c {{ information_schema_hints() }}
            left join sys.types as t {{ information_schema_hints() }} on c.system_type_id = t.system_type_id
        )

        select
            DB_NAME() as table_database,
            tv.schema_name as table_schema,
            tv.table_name,
            tv.table_type,
            null as table_comment,
            tv.principal_name as table_owner,
            cols.column_name,
            cols.column_index,
            cols.column_type,
            null as column_comment
        from tables_and_views tv
        join cols on tv.object_id = cols.object_id
        where ({%- for schema in schemas -%}
            upper(tv.schema_name) = upper('{{ schema }}'){%- if not loop.last %} or {% endif -%}
        {%- endfor -%})

        order by column_index
        {{ query_label }}

        {%- endcall -%}

    {{ return(load_result('catalog').table) }}

{%- endmacro %}

{% macro sqlserver__snapshot_merge_sql(target, source, insert_cols) -%}
    {%- set insert_cols_csv = insert_cols | join(', ') -%}

    merge into {{ target.render() }} as DBT_INTERNAL_DEST
    using {{ source }} as DBT_INTERNAL_SOURCE
    on DBT_INTERNAL_SOURCE.dbt_scd_id = DBT_INTERNAL_DEST.dbt_scd_id

    when matched
     and DBT_INTERNAL_DEST.dbt_valid_to is null
     and DBT_INTERNAL_SOURCE.dbt_change_type in ('update', 'delete')
        then update
        set dbt_valid_to = DBT_INTERNAL_SOURCE.dbt_valid_to

    when not matched
     and DBT_INTERNAL_SOURCE.dbt_change_type = 'insert'
        then insert ({{ insert_cols_csv }})
        values ({{ insert_cols_csv }})
    ;
{% endmacro %}

                join schemas on views.schema_id = schemas.schema_id
            ),

            tables_and_views as (
                select
                    object_id,
                    table_name,
                    schema_name,
                    principal_name,
                    table_type
                from
                    tables_with_metadata
                join principals on tables_with_metadata.owner_principal_id = principals.principal_id
                union all
                select
                    object_id,
                    table_name,
                    schema_name,
                    principal_name,
                    table_type
                from
                    views_with_metadata
                join principals on views_with_metadata.owner_principal_id = principals.principal_id
            ),

            cols as (

                select
                    c.object_id,
                    c.name as column_name,
                    c.column_id as column_index,
                    t.name as column_type
                from sys.columns as c {{ information_schema_hints() }}
                left join sys.types as t on c.system_type_id = t.system_type_id
            )

            select
                DB_NAME() as table_database,
                tv.schema_name as table_schema,
                tv.table_name,
                tv.table_type,
                null as table_comment,
                tv.principal_name as table_owner,
                cols.column_name,
                cols.column_index,
                cols.column_type,
                null as column_comment
            from tables_and_views tv
            join cols on tv.object_id = cols.object_id
            where (
                {%- for relation in relations -%}
                    {% if relation.schema and relation.identifier %}
                        (
                            upper(tv.schema_name) = upper('{{ relation.schema }}')
                            and upper(tv.table_name) = upper('{{ relation.identifier }}')
                        )
                    {% elif relation.schema %}
                        (
                            upper(tv.schema_name) = upper('{{ relation.schema }}')
                        )
                    {% else %}
                        {% do exceptions.raise_compiler_error(
                            '`get_catalog_relations` requires a list of relations, each with a schema'
                        ) %}
                    {% endif %}

                    {%- if not loop.last %} or {% endif -%}
                {%- endfor -%}
            )

            order by column_index
            {{ query_label }}

        {%- endcall -%}
        {{ return(load_result('catalog').table) }}
    {% else %}
        {% do exceptions.raise_compiler_error(
            '`get_catalog_relations` can catalog one database at a time'
        ) %}
    {% endif %}

{%- endmacro %}

macro.dbt_fabric.fabric__list_noncluster.macro_sql:
{% macro fabric__list_nonclustered_rowstore_indexes(relation) -%}
  {% call statement('list_nonclustered_rowstore_indexes', fetch_result=True) -%}

    SELECT i.name AS index_name
    , i.name + '__dbt_backup' as index_new_name
    , COL_NAME(ic.object_id,ic.column_id) AS column_name
    FROM sys.indexes AS i
    INNER JOIN sys.index_columns AS ic
        ON i.object_id = ic.object_id AND i.index_id = ic.index_id and i.type <> 5
    WHERE i.object_id = OBJECT_ID('{{ relation.schema }}.{{ relation.identifier }}')

    UNION ALL

    SELECT  obj.name AS index_name
    , obj.name + '__dbt_backup' as index_new_name
    , col1.name AS column_name
    FROM sys.foreign_key_columns fkc
    INNER JOIN sys.objects obj
        ON obj.object_id = fkc.constraint_object_id
    INNER JOIN sys.tables tab1
        ON tab1.object_id = fkc.parent_object_id
    INNER JOIN sys.schemas sch
        ON tab1.schema_id = sch.schema_id
    INNER JOIN sys.columns col1
        ON col1.column_id = parent_column_id AND col1.object_id = tab1.object_id
    INNER JOIN sys.tables tab2
        ON tab2.object_id = fkc.referenced_object_id
    INNER JOIN sys.columns col2
        ON col2.column_id = referenced_column_id AND col2.object_id = tab2.object_id
    WHERE sch.name = '{{ relation.schema }}' and tab1.name = '{{ relation.identifier }}'

  {% endcall %}
  {{ return(load_result('list_nonclustered_rowstore_indexes').table) }}
{% endmacro %}

doc.dbt.__overview__.block_contents:
### Welcome!

Welcome to the auto-generated documentation for your dbt project!

### Navigation

You can use the `Project` and `Database` navigation tabs on the left side of the window to explore the models
in your project.

#### Project Tab
The `Project` tab mirrors the directory structure of your dbt project. In this tab, you can see all of the
models defined in your dbt project, as well as models imported from dbt packages.

#### Database Tab
The `Database` tab also exposes your models, but in a format that looks more like a database explorer. This view
shows relations (tables and views) grouped into database schemas. Note that ephemeral models are _not_ shown
in this interface, as they do not exist in the database.

### Graph Exploration
You can click the blue icon on the bottom-right corner of the page to view the lineage graph of your models.

On model pages, you'll see the immediate parents and children of the model you're exploring. By clicking the `Expand`
button at the top-right of this lineage pane, you'll be able to see all of the models that are used to build,
or are built from, the model you're exploring.

Once expanded, you'll be able to use the `--select` and `--exclude` model selection syntax to filter the
models in the graph. For more information on model selection, check out the [dbt docs](https://docs.getdbt.com/docs/model-selection-syntax).

Note that you can also right-click on models to interactively filter and explore the graph.

---

### More information

- [What is dbt](https://docs.getdbt.com/docs/introduction)?
- Read the [dbt viewpoint](https://docs.getdbt.com/docs/viewpoint)
- [Installation](https://docs.getdbt.com/docs/installation)
- Join the [dbt Community](https://www.getdbt.com/community/) for questions and discussion
